ICD10 code 6 for those conditions requiring changed medical or treatment regimen within the past 14 days. CHAR 8 x x
M1017_CHGREG_ICD_NA M1017 Regimen Change In Past 14 Days - NA This field is checked if there have been no medical or treatment regimen changes within the past 14 days. 0 = Not Checked (No), 1 = Checked (Yes) CHAR 1 x x
M1021_PRI_DGN_ICD M1021 Primary Diagnosis ICD-10 Code This field lists the primary diagnosis (ICD-10). CHAR 8 x x x x
